ControlExpectedVersion.description: Strong resource ETag required in If-Match for mutable resources.

ControlHealth.description: Sanitized readiness with stable check names and states.

ControlIdempotencyKey.description: Printable ASCII retry key. The raw value and request body are never persisted.

ControlPageMeta.description: Keyset pagination metadata. Absence of next_cursor means the page is final.

RestoreCommitResult.description: Completed restore counts. The initiating session is revoked.

RestoreStage.description: Actor-bound restore upload state without a local path or secret material.

browserSession.description: Opaque Secure HttpOnly browser session cookie. Cookie mutations also require synchronizer CSRF proof.
browserSession.name: __Host-secretsauce_session

localHostAuthority.description: Local host or Unix-socket authority. Remote bearer credentials are not accepted.

managementApiKey.description: System-owned API key with immutable static role and resource scope. It never satisfies human step-up.

info.description: Versioned management API. Secret inputs are body-only, bounded, write-only, and excluded from logs, errors, audit, and later reads.
info.title: SecretSauce Control API

enum: I understand this backup permanently excludes identities, access grants, audit history, runtime state, and deployment configuration.

400.description: Invalid request. Validation details contain only a JSON Pointer and rule.

403.description: The operation is forbidden or requires human step-up.

404.description: The route or an authorized resource was not found.

409.description: The resource version or idempotency digest conflicts.

413.description: The request body exceeds its bounded limit.

428.description: A required expected resource version is missing.

429.description: A bounded request rate was exceeded.

500.description: The request failed without exposing internal details.

503.description: A required local subsystem is unavailable.
